title: onobrychis tabrizensis
intro: Onobrychis tabrizensis, also known as Persian clover or Tabrizian onobrychis, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Onobrychis tabrizensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Onobrychis tabrizensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Persian medicine as a treatment for various health conditions.
